documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner, Social Security Administration
documents.summary: Large 278-T signed 02/27/2026; the PDF states the filer received a 0-day filing extension. OGE-certified 04/07/2026. Discloses 306 transactions, primarily sales executed on 01/30/2026 (Agilent, Apple, AbbVie, Abbott, Accenture, Allstate, Alphabet, Amazon, Berkshire Hathaway, Boeing, Chevron, Disney, Duke Energy, salesforce.com, Cigna, Carlyle Group, etc.) within an SMA, almost all in the $1,001-$15,000 range with one Amazon lot at $15,001-$50,000. All rows in the extracted dataset are marked No on the 30-day notification flag.

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification digitally signed 03/25/2026. Lists ethics agreement signed 9/29/2025, confirmed 12/18/2025, certification due 3/25/2026. Marks N/A on resignations, No on divestitures-completed-within-time-period, Yes on having filed a 278-T (filing date 2/27/2026), and Yes on managed accounts, interim recusals, and both recusal categories. Comments section states 90-day obligations are satisfied but discloses a 120-day extension to divest TPG Twin Brook Capital Income Fund, Blue Owl Credit Income Corp., Oaktree Strategic Credit Fund, and KKR Real Estate Select Trust, plus a 30-day extension after a lockout period for Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp.; Mody states a new certification will be filed at the end of the 120-day period.

documents.label: Amended Ethics Agreement
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner (nominee)
documents.summary: Amended ethics agreement transmitted by SSA on 05/18/2026, with Mody's 05/14/2026 amendment attached. The amendment says Mody timely requested full redemptions from Blue Owl Credit Income Corp. and KKR Real Estate Select Trust but received only partial redemptions, and extends those divestiture compliance deadlines to 300 days after confirmation. The PDF also includes the original 09/29/2025 ethics agreement: Ivy Hill Advisors LLC remains dormant during appointment; Common Values PAC triggers impartiality recusal; Section 4 lists 90-day divestitures of Alphabet, Amazon, AT&T, Autodesk, Cloudflare, Meta, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Oracle, and Taiwan Semiconductor; and Section 6 addresses spouse employment at Johns Hopkins Community Physicians.

documents.label: Nominee 278
documents.title: Deputy Commissioner (nominee)
documents.summary: Nominee 278e signed 07/28/2025 and OGE-certified 09/29/2025. Lists prior positions including Staff Director, Senate Republican Conference under Sen. John Barrasso (9/2019-1/2025), Ivy Hill Advisors LLC (President 3/2025-Present), and Trump Vance 2025 Transition Inc. (volunteer advisor 7/2024-4/2025). Reports Common Values PAC salary ($40,000), a Roth IRA holding QQQM, and an IRA #2 with a William Blair All Cap Growth SMA containing 30+ individual stock holdings (each $1,001-$15,000 except MSFT and NVDA at $15,001-$50,000) including Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Broadcom, NVIDIA, and Microsoft.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Arjun Mody. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
